en.name: Level 8 — Cave Systems
en.shortDescription: A vast underground cave network with non-Euclidean geometry, shifting gravity, flooded passages and many hostile entities.
en.atmosphere: Oppressively dark caverns, cold almond water, eerie silence broken by creature sounds and flickering emergency lights.
en.tips: Follow the 9th Road markers religiously. Stay warm, dry and awake against hypothermia. Avoid glyph-marked spider colonies.
